name: Huang Hsiang Construction Corporation
summary: Huang Hsiang Construction Corporation builds, sells, and rents public housing and commercial building in Taiwan. The company's product portfolio includes home, shops, offices, shopping malls, and parking spaces. It also imports/exports and sells building materials. The company was formerly known as Huang Ming Construction Corporation, LCC and changed its name to Huang Hsiang Construction Corporation in April 1996. Huang Hsiang Construction Corporation was founded in 1991 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
